title: localization — trait composition
description: Two owned traits. HasTranslations for Eloquent models with translated columns — pairs with #[Translatable] property attributes to declare which columns are localised. IsLocaleAware for lightweight consumers that need the current locale + fallback chain without model bindings.

owned.description: Mixed into Eloquent models with translated columns. Adds ->translate($locale) scope + magic accessors that return the active-locale value for #[Translatable] properties. Storage strategy: JSONB column `translations` on the model with shape `{ locale: { field: value } }` so the model row remains one physical row.
owned.wraps: The trait EXTENDS Spatie\Translatable\HasTranslations — we do not reimplement JSONB accessor/mutator/fallback semantics. Our subclass adds (a) #[Translatable] attribute discovery so the property list is inferred (no getTranslatable()) method), (b) `TranslationWritten` event dispatch, (c) WorkspaceLocale-aware fallback chain, (d) integration with the `translatable_*` validation rules.

owned.description: Lightweight trait. Adds `locale()` accessor pulling from LocaleResolver + `resolveFallbackChain()` for constructors that need the full chain (used by view composers + notification classes).

framework.reason: PlatformLanguage + WorkspaceLocale. NOT Translation (high volume; hard-purged on retention) or TranslationJob (append-only).

platform_language.notes: NO BelongsToWorkspace — PlatformLanguages are platform-scoped catalogue (renamed from `Language` in the Wave 5 dedupe against geography::Language).

workspace_locale.notes: Per-workspace association of PlatformLanguage + preferences. FK column stays `language_id` (Laravel FK-column vs target-table decoupled); wire shape exposes the nested resource under the key `language` for backward-compatible client consumption.

translation.notes: workspace_id nullable (null = platform default). NO BelongsToWorkspace enforcement — the trait presumes non-null. High-volume table; NO SoftDeletes / HasUserstamps / HasActivityLog to keep row writes cheap.

translation_job.notes: Append-only job audit rows. NO SoftDeletes; retention by hard purge.
